## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `go test ./...`.
- [ ] I ran `go vet ./...`.
- [ ] I ran `go run ./cmd/codex-action-guard audit --all --fail-on high`.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing behavior.
- [ ] New or changed findings are evidence-bound and include false-positive notes.
